name: tia-project-general
description: Routed by tia-openness-roadmap. C# Openness implementation of project and portal lifecycle: opening, attaching, creating, archiving, retrieving, saving, copying, closing, deleting projects, project server sessions, transactions, exclusive access, UMAC/UMC, project library entry points, project-level CAx exchange, authentication events, project history, language settings, diagnostics, and advanced multiuser/VCI workflows.
